definition.name: NXtestBase
definition.doc: Minimal base class used as a controlled fixture in converter unit tests. Not part of the NeXus standard definitions. Covers: NX_CHAR, NX_FLOAT with units, NX_INT, NX_BOOLEAN, closed enumeration, group reference, and group-level attribute — the key structural features exercised by the NXDL-to-metainfo converter.

field.name: label
field.doc: A text label field (tests NX_CHAR → str mapping).

field.name: energy
field.doc: An energy value (tests NX_FLOAT + unit → np.float64 mapping).

field.name: count
field.doc: An integer count (tests NX_INT → np.int64 mapping).

field.name: flag
field.doc: A boolean flag (tests NX_BOOLEAN → bool mapping).

field.name: mode
field.doc: Operating mode (tests closed enumeration → MEnum mapping).

group.name: data
group.doc: Primary data group (tests group → SubSection mapping).

attribute.name: version
attribute.doc: Schema version string (tests group-level attribute → Quantity mapping).
